title: You at the Head of the Table
subtitle: A visualisation for picturing yourself leading from a calm, generous, and fully present place of abundance
excerpt: A short visualisation from the Day 81 theme of a 12-week money programme. The image is you at the head of the table: calm, generous, clear. The wealth you have built sits around you, not above you.
sourceNotes: Original visualisation created for homemade.education, drawing on the Day 81 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use before a meeting, a decision, or a conversation where you want to bring the quality of an abundant leader: calm, unhurried, and genuinely generous.

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 81 theme: see yourself as an abundant leader. The image is a table, and you at the head of it, not as a performance but as a fact.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or let your gaze soften.
Picture a table. It can be round or long, simple or formal. Around it are people you trust, or people you serve, or simply the work of your life.
You are at the head of it. Not elevated, not performing. Just present, seated, calm. The wealth you have built sits around you like a warm room, not above you like a standard you haven't met.
You speak from that room. You decide from it. You give from it. There is enough at this table for everyone seated at it.
Sit with that image for a moment.
Open your eyes when you are ready.
Original to homemade.education. Draws on the Day 81 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
